plan.action: Add review.json to CLIPPY_EXPECTED_ARTIFACTS array in lib/artifacts.sh, and update the header comment to list it alongside the existing artifacts.

Add planning_persist_review function to lib/planning.sh. It should accept (output_dir, ticket_id, review_json), mkdir -p the ticket dir, and write review_json to Output/<ticket_id>/review.json — mirroring the existing planning_persist pattern.
In planning_run_loop (lib/planning.sh), call planning_persist_review immediately after planning_persist inside the approve branch, passing output_dir, ticket_id, and review_json.

Update tests/artifacts.bats: add review.json to any test that constructs a complete artifact set (used by artifacts_validate_complete and artifacts_summarize tests), and add a test verifying review.json appears in CLIPPY_EXPECTED_ARTIFACTS.

Update tests/planning.bats: add a test for planning_persist_review that verifies it writes review.json to Output/<ticket_id>/review.json, and add a test verifying planning_run_loop persists review.json when the reviewer approves.

testing_recommendations: Test planning_persist_review writes review.json to the correct path under Output/<ticket_id>/
Test planning_run_loop calls planning_persist_review on approve: verify Output/<ticket_id>/review.json exists after a successful loop run
Test that review.json is included in CLIPPY_EXPECTED_ARTIFACTS (artifacts_validate_complete must require it)
Test artifacts_validate_complete returns 1 and lists review.json as missing when it is absent
Test artifacts_summarize includes review.json in missing[] when absent and present[] when present
Ensure all existing artifacts.bats tests that construct a 'complete' artifact set now include review.json to avoid regressions
risks: Existing tests/artifacts.bats tests that build a complete artifact set without review.json will start failing — all such fixtures must be updated in the same change

planning_run_loop only reaches the approve branch on success; the review_json variable is scoped inside the while loop — verify it is accessible at the persist call site (it is, based on current code structure)
